Uses of Record Class
com.knezevic.edaf.v3.repr.types.PermutationVector

Packages that use PermutationVector
Package
Description
com.knezevic.edaf.v3.algorithms
Top-level algorithm drivers and reusable base classes.
com.knezevic.edaf.v3.algorithms.permutation
Permutation-focused EDA drivers.
com.knezevic.edaf.v3.algorithms.plugins.permutation
 
com.knezevic.edaf.v3.models.permutation
Probabilistic models for permutation spaces.
com.knezevic.edaf.v3.models.permutation.plugins
 
com.knezevic.edaf.v3.problems
Problem implementations and shared problem-level helpers.
com.knezevic.edaf.v3.problems.crypto
Boolean-function and cryptography optimization problems.
com.knezevic.edaf.v3.problems.permutation
Permutation benchmark problems.
com.knezevic.edaf.v3.problems.plugins.permutation
 
com.knezevic.edaf.v3.repr.distance
Distance metrics between genotypes.
com.knezevic.edaf.v3.repr.impl
Representation implementations and validators.
com.knezevic.edaf.v3.repr.plugins.permutation

    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    final class 
    EhmPermutationEdaAlgorithm
    Dedicated EHM/EHBSA-style permutation driver based on edge-histogram modeling.

  • Uses of PermutationVector in com.knezevic.edaf.v3.algorithms.permutation

    Subclasses with type arguments of type PermutationVector in com.knezevic.edaf.v3.algorithms.permutation
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    final class 
    EhbsaAlgorithm
    Dedicated EHBSA driver for adjacency-structured permutation optimization.
    final class 
    KendallPermutationEdaAlgorithm
    Dedicated Kendall-distance permutation EDA driver alias.
    final class 
    MallowsEdaAlgorithm
    Dedicated Mallows-model permutation EDA driver.
    final class 
    PlackettLuceEdaAlgorithm
    Dedicated Plackett-Luce permutation EDA driver.
    final class 
    PositionBasedPermutationEdaAlgorithm
    Dedicated position-based permutation EDA driver.
